string.text: Find a way to the sealed door
Following the Doctor’s lead, I found a stash containing the Decoder. With it, I can open the secret door in the Sarcophagus. But what awaits me on the other side...

The Decoder unlocked the door, and I managed to get into a secret bunker near the Sarcophagus. It seems this is the place where the illusion known as the Wish Granter is being controlled. I need to find the Monolith control system.
I found the Monolith projection. It’s surrounded by six blocks, which are likely powering the device.
Come to us, Marked One. Enter the code: 26041986
